name: get_current_datetime
description: Get the current date and time formatted as a readable string.

name: get_hourly_forecast
description: Get hourly weather forecast for a specific location and date. Returns temperature, humidity, wind speed, cloud cover, and weather conditions for each hour of the specified date. If location is not found in predefined coordinates, it will use current location based on IP.

place.description: Location name for weather forecast. Use 'current' to get forecast for current IP-based location. If location is not found in predefined coordinates, current location will be used instead.

date.description: Date for the forecast in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2024-01-15'). Must be within the available forecast range.

name: get_current_location
description: Get the current geographical location based on IP address. Returns latitude, longitude, city, and country information.

name: execute_appliance
description: Receive Json argument store list of appliance that is need to execute, read and execute if the argument is accepted.

json_str.description: A string of json format argument, contain house appliances (in the provided list) and its relevant execution argument (use " to ensure input is a string).
